title: Sales Manager Vacancy at InfraMantra - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at InfraMantra - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
InfraMantra, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About InfraMantra:
InfraMantra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with InfraMantra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
